title: Cold Sweat
description: Adds a fitting and difficult temperature system to Minecraft, plus more!
body:
Cold Sweat is a Vanilla-friendly, deeply customizeable, and performant temperature mod for Minecraft. It leverages an advanced temperature system to give a well-rounded experience, packed with features that help or harm you. A prepared player can weather the elements of Minecraft's hostile environments, but if you strand yourself in the middle of nowhere, there's no second chance! [![Discord Server](https://imgur.com/5W2wczH.png)](https://discord.gg/cUnhb3Ek3E) [![Wiki](https://imgur.com/LS8jcYX.png)](https://github.com/Momo-Studios/Cold-Sweat/wiki) [![Docs](https://imgur.com/E3TJOkF.png)](https://mikul.gitbook.io/cold-sweat/) ![Fair Use](https://i.imgur.com/3G55Lz2.png)


![](https://i.imgur.com/UPTNuaM.png) **A dynamic temperature system that is affected by the world and the player (biomes, blocks, items, weather, altitude, etc.)** ![](https://imgur.com/zkHjThs.png) ![](https://imgur.com/cg1hY5h.png) **Items and blocks that help the player survive against the world** ![](https://imgur.com/JY66oAS.png) **Insulate armor to resist the elements** ![](https://imgur.com/rPG3tpz.png) **Stay next to blocks to warm up or cool down** ![](https://imgur.com/otCZaYe.png) **The thermometer shows precise temperature** ![](https://imgur.com/HMqZC5z.png) **Use waterskins for quick relief or as cooling/heating packs** ![](https://imgur.com/0WqSxyR.png)** **Detailed in-game and file-based configs** ![](https://i.imgur.com/W9vKlTk.png) ![Please do not use Configured with this mod](https://imgur.com/wUkB0JE.png) ![Please do not ask for a Fabric port](https://imgur.com/AeJAw4A.png)  ## **~ Special Integration With ~** **[Serene Seasons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/serene-seasons)** **[Better Weather](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-weather) (Discontinued)** **[Biomes O' Plenty](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/biomes-o-plenty)** **[Armor Underwear](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armor-underwear-mod)** **[Oh, the Biomes You'll Go](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oh-the-biomes-youll-go)** **[Curios](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)** **[Atmospheric](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/atmospheric)** **[Environmental](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/environmental)** **[Terralith](https://beta.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terralith)** **[Thirst Was Taken](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thirst-was-taken)** **[Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create)** **[Enhanced Visuals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhancedvisuals)** **[Vampirism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vampirism-become-a-vampire)** **[WW's Overhauled Overworld](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/william-wythers-overhauled-overworld)** **[WW's Expanded Ecosphere](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/expanded-ecosphere)** **[Weather, Storms, & Tornadoes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/weather-storms-tornadoes)**
*In vanilla, every biome has its own temperature. This mod uses that property for the temperature system, which means that this mod should be compatible with almost all modded biomes (given their temperatures are configured correctly ;) ).* *~*
